description: U.S. Department of Labor infographic on a dark navy and black background. The top portion is a photograph (tinted blue) of the exterior of the 'Frances Perkins Department of Labor Building', with the carved building name visible on the stone facade. Across the middle in large white serif type (italic 'The Biden' plus bold 'JOB MARKET') is the headline 'The Biden JOB MARKET'. Below sits a white rounded rectangle data card titled in italics 'Change in Employment Level August 2023-2024', containing an embedded FRED (Federal Reserve Economic Data) bar chart comparing monthly 'Employment Level - Native Born' (dark blue bars) and 'Employment Level - Foreign Born' (light blue bars) from Aug 2023 to Aug 2024, sourced 'U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics via FRED.' Beneath the chart, two large summary lines read 'NATIVE-BORN WORKERS: -1,319,000' and 'FOREIGN-BORN WORKERS: +1,240,000', with a small source line 'Sources: BLS, Federal Reserve Bank, Fox News.'
notable_text: The Biden JOB MARKET | Change in Employment Level August 2023-2024 | NATIVE-BORN WORKERS: -1,319,000 | FOREIGN-BORN WORKERS: +1,240,000
